summary: Live-applied ADR 0254 from merged main commit 72ee92ef77cae2cf73e3c42168b2e193984c05c1 after release 0.177.91 reached origin/main, replayed make converge-serverclaw on the exact mainline tree, preserved the governed 8096 Proxmox and guest firewall lane to coolify-lv3, and re-verified internal edge reachability, bootstrap admin sign-in, and public chat.example.com over HTTPS end to end.

verification.check: Remote pre-push gate and repo automation
verification.observed: The final `git push origin HEAD:main` passed the remote pre-push gate with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-lint`, `ansible-syntax`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `dependency-direction`, `dependency-graph`, `documentation-index`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `integration-tests`, `packer-validate`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `security-scan`, `service-completeness`, `tofu-validate`, `type-check`, `workstream-surfaces`, and `yaml-lint` all green, confirming the repo automation and validation paths on the exact mainline release tree.

`make converge-serverclaw` completed successfully from merged `main` source commit `72ee92ef77cae2cf73e3c42168b2e193984c05c1` with recap `coolify-lv3 ok=60 changed=4 failed=0 skipped=14`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=63 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=7`, `nginx-lv3 ok=39 changed=4 failed=0 skipped=7`, and `proxmox-host ok=241 changed=6 failed=0 skipped=108`.
A fresh host probe on `proxmox-host` confirmed `/etc/pve/firewall/170.fw` still contains `17:IN ACCEPT -source 10.10.10.10/32 -p tcp -dport 8096` after the merged-main replay.

Fresh `nginx-lv3` probes succeeded on both checks: `nc -vz -w 5 10.10.10.70 8096` returned `Connection to 10.10.10.70 8096 port [tcp/*] succeeded!`, and `curl -sk -D - https://127.0.0.1/ -H 'Host: chat.example.com' -o /dev/null` returned `HTTP/2 200` with `server: nginx` and `content-type: text/html; charset=utf-8`.

verification.check: Coolify runtime health and bootstrap admin sign-in
verification.observed: Fresh `coolify-lv3` checks returned `200` from `http://127.0.0.1:8096/`, and guest-local bootstrap admin sign-in returned `{"email":"ops@example.com","role":"admin","token_type":"Bearer","has_token":true}`.

Fresh public probes returned `HTTP/1.1 308 Permanent Redirect` with `Location: https://chat.example.com/` on `http://chat.example.com/`, and `HTTP/2 200` with the repo-managed security headers on `https://chat.example.com/`.

`live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `canonical_truth.py --check`, `subdomain_exposure_audit.py --validate`, `platform_manifest.py --check`, and `agent-standards` all passed after the canonical-truth refresh; `workstream-surfaces` then returned the expected terminal-branch guard because `codex/ws-0254-main-merge` is no longer an active owner once its status becomes `merged`.

notes: This receipt supersedes the partial 2026-03-29 mainline receipt as the canonical merged-main proof for ADR 0254.
The 2026-03-29 branch-local receipt remains preserved as the first successful latest-main proof before later origin/main drift reopened the exact-main replay requirement.
Platform version remains 0.130.60 because ADR 0254 was applied from merged main without a separate platform version bump.
The final metadata push should use the audited gate-bypass path because the branch-scoped workstream ownership validator intentionally rejects terminal workstreams on non-main branches.
